privileged_info_summary: The task uses real Microsoft (MSFT) stock historical data from Yahoo Finance spanning 2023-2024. The three pivot points are identified in actual market data: Pivot A on January 6, 2023 (low of 219.35) is verified as the lowest point of the entire 2023 trading year. Pivot C on October 26, 2023 (low of 326.94) is verified as a higher low, representing recovery structure. However, Pivot B on July 18, 2023 (high of 366.78) is NOT the highest high of 2023; it ranks 11th among 2023 highs, with the true annual high of 384.30 occurring on November 29, 2023. The task uses real, non-synthetic financial data.
